things.name: Aso Rock (Presidential Villa)
things.description: 800m granite monolith that dominates the capital with the presidential palace at its base

things.name: Nigerian National Mosque
things.description: One of Africa's largest mosques with four 120m minarets and a blue dome

things.name: National Museum Abuja
things.description: Nigeria's arts and crafts from the Benin bronzes to contemporary Naija culture

things.name: Zuma Rock
things.description: Imposing 725m monolith 40km north of Abuja - the Gateway to Abuja

things.name: Millennium Tower
things.description: Nigeria's iconic 170m symbol of modern democracy and African renaissance

things.name: Jabi Lake Mall
things.description: Mall built on the shores of Jabi Lake with restaurants on the water

things.name: Arts and Craft Village (Wuse Market)
things.description: Hausa leatherwork, Yoruba beadwork and Igbo carvings in the city craft market

things.name: National Children's Park and Zoo
things.description: Wildlife including hippos, lions and giraffes in the purpose-built federal capital

things.name: Gwagwa Hills Nature Walk
things.description: Hiking in the granite hills surrounding Abuja with wildlife and city views

things.name: Pepper Soup at Transcorp Hilton
things.description: Nigeria's legendary spicy goat offal soup - the definitive Abuja late-night dining experience
